statement: In every magma, Equation 137 (`x = y * ((z * x) * w)`) implies Equation 3954 (`x * y = (y * (x * y)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0716
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z x) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op x y)) x)
